summary: Full MVP testing of AI Research Automation Hub - backend APIs (14/14 passing) and frontend UI flows all working correctly.

issues: data-testid for 'SaaS' niche generates as 'niche-saas' but the niche name is 'SaaS' - the replace pattern .toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-') yields 'saas' correctly. Minor: no issue, just observed

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 357 lines - acceptable for MVP but approaching the 700-line limit
No input validation on dataset_size range (could allow negative or very large values)
Export endpoint uses import inside function (openpyxl) - minor, should be top-level import
seed_data_creation: Created 4 research tasks and 2 templates via backend tests (TEST_ prefixed). 1 additional template 'Test Template from UI' created via UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows tested and working: Dashboard stat cards, Research Builder wizard (4 steps), live prompt preview, Run Research -> Results with polling, Export (JSON/CSV/XLSX), History with status badges, Templates page with Use Template navigation, Save Template modal. Backend 100% passing. Gemini AI integration live and producing real results (25 results for SaaS on Reddit).
